---
name: Security Report
about: Report a security vulnerability
---

## ⚠️ Do NOT use this template for security vulnerabilities

Please report security vulnerabilities by **private email** to:

**security@banzami.org**

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full security policy and what to include in your report.

Financial invariant vulnerabilities (any path that could corrupt ledger entries, allow negative balances, or create/destroy money) are treated as critical severity with 24-hour response time.
